programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Two incorrigible scam artists -- one low rent and the other high class -- compete to swindle a naïve tech prodigy out of his vast fortune.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour tips its hat to a poker legend with a $4,000,000 shootout worthy of the great Doyle Brunson himself.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Russia, France, Canada and the USA all send their best poker players to Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only four players remain in the scramble to survive at Bellagio.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's one wild ride at the WPT Legends of Poker in Los Angeles as this final table fight takes off.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: That Lucky Touch
programme.desc: A pacifist newswoman covering a NATO meeting becomes entangled with her neighbor, an international arms dealer.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: 500 mph Storm
programme.desc: When an energy experiment goes haywire, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: Family Games
programme.desc: Sloane and her boyfriend Barrett return to her childhood home determined to ruin her father Roan's re-marriage. Family secrets surface and give rise to a puzzling future.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: My Nanny's Secret
programme.desc: Starring Haylie Duff. When a home invasion robbery leaves one member of the wealthy Tyrell family dead, the family's live-in nanny, Claudia, begins to suspect that her troubled brother may be the culprit.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, who has become known as Paul Muad'Dib, leads a rebellion against the Harkonnen, who have the secret support of the emperor.

programme.title: Jail: Family First
programme.desc: Drinking and driving are not a good mix for a mother and her baby.

programme.title: Jail: Over Cooked
programme.desc: A man is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill.

programme.title: Jail: Heart to Heart
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Great Expectations
programme.desc: In upstate New York, Beat builds three grandiose gazebos for two brothers with neighbouring properties. Back home, Bryan Jr. asks his son Little Man to take charge of his first build ever.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Planes, Cranes and Automobiles
programme.desc: Beat takes on his biggest build this season, a 15,000 square foot mansion with logs so massive they tax the crane and crew to the limits.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Good As New
programme.desc: On a two-man build in Alberta, Joel and his right-hand man Shawn are challenged by broken logs and stubborn headers.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Barn Burner
programme.desc: After Beat and Sam build a beautiful home in Alberta, the clients egg them on to a paint ball battle on their acreage.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Cursed Treasures

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Walking Through History

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Lacey stops a woman's attempted suicide but feels guilt and responsibility when the woman turns up murdered soon after. When Cagney and Lacey investigate the murder, they soon discover a world of massive gambling debts and loan sharks.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Out Of Control
programme.desc: Cagney & Lacey investigate a homicide that occurred during an attempted burglary. They discover that the gun used was purchased illegally. In light of this information, Lacey also discovers that her son, Michael, has been playing with her revolver.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: American Dream
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate a series of fire-bombings in the garment district, and the trucking company that they suspect is behind them. Meanwhile, Harvey Lacey switches occupations and becomes a tax-shelter salesman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Happily Ever After
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey investigate a larceny case after a stray bullet offers a new development in 32,000 petty theft cases. A singular credit department employee appears to be behind it all. Meanwhile, Dory McKenna proposes to Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Rules Of The Game
programme.desc: Cagney is requested by Capt. Hennessey to partner with him in the investigation of the murder of a foreign diplomat while Lacey is on desk duty. Everything becomes complicated when Cagney becomes a victim of sexual harassment by Capt. Hennessey.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: Carol finds her match when she meets charming Dennis. But their love comes to a painful end when Carol dies unexpectedly. Is he to blame for her sudden death?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: When firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment, homicide detective Joe Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: Night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The Spencer's are the "Rabid Dog Cigarettes Contest Winners" and they win a vacation.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Nighty-Nightmare/U.S Acres: Banana Nose/Ode to Odie
programme.desc: Garfield has a nightmare where he grows into a gigantic cat, climbing tall buildings./Roy has his feelings hurt when he is called "Banana Nose."/Odie meets with a tough alley dog and two lady dogs.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Fraidy Cat/U.S. Acres: Shell Shocked Sheldon/Nothing to Sneeze At
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie watch a horror film./Orson decides to hatch Sheldon./Garfield has a sneezing attack.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield's Moving Experience/U.S. Acres: Wade: You're Afraid/Good Mousekeeping
programme.desc: Garfield decides to move away from home./Orson hypnotizes Wade./Garfield must rid the house of mice.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Identity Crisis/U.S. Acres: The Bad Sport/Up a Tree
programme.desc: Garfield imitates dogs and mice./The gang plays "pig ball."/Garfield climbs a tree.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Weighty Problem/U.S. Acres: The Worm Turns/Good Cat, Bad Cat
programme.desc: Garfield tampers with the new talking scale./Booker's hunt for worms comes to a stop./Garfield's good and bad side battle for control.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cabin Fever/U.S. Acres: Return of Power Pig/Fair Exchange
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are snowbound in a cabin with no food./A monster circulates around the farm, Orson dons his "Power Pig" togs./Garfield dreams he changes places with Jon.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Binky Show/U.S. Acres: Keeping Cool/Don't Move!
programme.desc: Garfield decides to win Jon a birthday present on a game show./When Orson's brothers come to torment him./Odie must remain outside a pet store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Magic Mutt/U.S. Acres: Short Story/Monday Misery
programme.desc: When Jon goes to an all-night magic shop./Booker is irritated by his height./Garfield attempts to defeat the evil day, Monday.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery In The Desert
programme.desc: When an innocent couple is murdered execution style in the Arizona desert it marks the beginning of a 50 year search for the truth. Who really killed them and why? After decades of investigation the controversial case remains shrouded in mystery

programme.title: On the Case: Alarm and Betrayal
programme.desc: Police must unravel a puzzling mystery when a beloved father and real estate executive is ambushed in his office.

programme.title: On the Case: She Wasn't Alone
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is viciously murdered just 24 hours after she was engaged to be married.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: On the Case: Tangled Web
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day rendezvous ends in murder.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family's Shame
programme.desc: The broadcast presents accounts of people who suffer the reality that a close relative has committed murder and endure the struggle between family ties and civic responsibility.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Justice For Sheila?
programme.desc: This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in L.A.
programme.desc: Focuses on two California couples: the Adairs and the Shapiros. Mindy Shapiro discovered that her husband Michael, an orthopedic surgeon, was having an affair with Jeanie Adair, and in 1996, after 11 years of marriage, the couple opted for divorce.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: An investigation of the murder of Vicki Robinson, a 49-year-old divorced Florida real estate agent, and the role of her 15-year-old daughter, Valessa in the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Heroes Under Fire
programme.desc: A fire that ignited in an abandoned warehouse in Worcester, Massachusetts in 1999, claimed the lives of six firefighters. A homeless couple living in the building, were subsequently charged with manslaughter for starting the blaze.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Citizen Jane
programme.desc: When Gertrude McCabe was murdered, her niece Jane Alexander was named her principal beneficiary. Jane, a widow in her 70s, began to suspect that her live-in boyfriend, Tom O'Donnell, might have been involved in the crime.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Holly gets a diagnosis of Chronic Fatigue Syndrome, will a heart attack lead to the correct diagnosis? Jo Ann notices an unusual patch of skin, and procedures leave her in the worst pain of her life.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Marji is involved in a major car accident and receives a diagnosis that is soon disproven. Mark experiences intense stomach pain and he feels bloated after eating food.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Kerry, misdiagnosed as bipolar, sees similar behavior in her young son, enabling doctors to correctly diagnose them. Ariel has hurt his shoulder and an old teacher puts him on the path to healing.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Karen's stomach pains and migraines lead to rapid weight loss and gain and she's desperate for a doctor to take her seriously. Janis gets pain in her abdomen that doctors diagnose as gas.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: “Brain on Fire” author Susannah Callahan, spent a fortune identifying what was making her ill. After a misdiagnosis, a simple test was administered, and the real source of her ailment was unveiled.

programme.title: Game On
programme.desc: Matthew falls for Laura, his beautiful neighbor, while Martin consults a lawyer about custody of baby Rosie.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Wedding Deception
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix attend the wedding of an old college friend, Oscar aims to reconnect with an old flame while Felix is determined to show his ex-wife (guest star Christine Woods) that he's a changed man.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself
programme.desc: Felix's hypochondria kicks into overdrive when Oscar starts dating the most important person in Felix's life - his doctor. Erinn Hayes guest stars as Sharon.

programme.title: Murder in Paradise
programme.desc: The harrowing tale of the mysterious death of biology student Shannon Martin, who was stabbed during fieldwork in a tropical seaside town in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Killer Evidence
programme.desc: A homeless man finds human limbs wrapped in black bin bags. It's the start of a trail of forensic clues that will eventually lead police to one of London's most shocking serial killers.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Irene Munro, a woman enjoying a holiday on the south coast of England, was tragically bludgeoned to death during what should have been a relaxing getaway. Her life was violently taken by two unemployed war veterans, who then robbed her.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After going missing, police suspect that Gary Hampson has been murdered by a drug dealer over a dispute, even though no body is ever found.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: The murder of Edwin Rose, while on holiday climbing mountains at Goatfell on the Isle of Arran, led to a manhunt and the longest ever prison term in Scotland.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After not being seen for several days, Rita Parminter was found dead in her home in Hastings. To police, it initially appeared that she had taken her own life.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist
programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Glenn Rycroft – The Cancer Con Artist
programme.desc: The former air steward who faked cancer and raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from his local community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hostage
programme.desc: A man robs an armoured car at gunpoint and holds a massage parlor worker hostage. As police investigate, they find startling links to a series of robberies, all taking place during the Christmas season.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: The Case: A Predator of the Court (Véronique Béchu)
programme.desc: Véronique Béchu has handled hundreds of rape and incest cases. The protection of minors is its hobbyhorse. But the police commander will never forget one investigation.

programme.title: The Case: Murder in the Vineyards
programme.desc: On December 6, 2012, Jean Aprin's lifeless body was found on his Roquebrussanne winery.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: The Case: The Angers Pedophile Network
programme.desc: In 2002, the biggest case of pedophilia in France breaks out in Angers.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 17-year-old Carla Walker is with her boyfriend Rodney in his car when suddenly the door is ripped open by an unknown assailant. The man beats Rodney with a gun and drags Carla away screaming.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 16-year-old high school student Kim Bryant is last seen outside a Dairy Queen restaurant. Three weeks later, her body is discovered by three teenage boys hiking on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Mum of two, Linda Slaten, is found murdered in her bedroom in her Lakeland, Florida flat. She'd been sexually assaulted while her children slept and strangled with a coat hanger.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 22-year-old Diana Hanson fails to return home from jogging in Las Vegas. Her worried parents call police but in a devastating turn of events, news of a brutal murder scene emerges.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a little girl is found in the Arizona desert. Detectives are unable to identify her, so the local community lays her to rest with the name 'Little Miss Nobody'.

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis look back at what's been going on around the world in the last seven days in the company of guests Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Kerry Godliman, Milton Jones and Chris Washington.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry joins the local neighbourhood watch scheme, but everything doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Director's Short Cut
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: In this episode, the couple are moving to Purley but plan to redecorate the house before moving in - until they learn of the sinister reputation of their new home.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The mutilated bodies of two women sparked a massive police manhunt. With advances in forensic science, investigators brought Ireland's only living serial killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder investigation surrounding the death of a young, defenceless woman led police to another case, where the science of DNA profiling helped to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring the perpetrators to account.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Glenna and Marty Duram’s marriage was always volatile. They argued about money and Glenna’s gambling habit. Jokes about killing one another barely raised an eyebrow - until the day Marty was actually found dead.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Sophie and Martin Cavanagh had a fairytale wedding. Sophie worked hard to give the family a better life, but Martin’s jealousy drove the couple apart, and he went to desperate lengths to stop her finding love elsewhere.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder

programme.desc: A cunning arsonist stays one step ahead of the police and terrifies a small farming community until behavioural profiling help detectives zero in on a very unlikely suspect.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two investigative journalists and a natural health practitioner who maintain vaccines are neither safe nor effective.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS

programme.desc: The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: An Arthur Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Arthur and his family are getting ready for Thanksgiving! But when Pal disappears to go on his own adventure, family, friends and the rest of Elwood City try to get Pal home. Will they be able to celebrate the best Thanksgiving yet?

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)
programme.desc: Only one isolated atoll prevents an enemy invasion of Hawaii. Midway Island is where the Japanese fleet converges on a tiny American base with a massive strafing and bombing attack.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)
programme.desc: For the first time since Americans entered the war, Marines face Japanese infantrymen at Guadal Canal. In the jungles, two powerful armies clash in a six month battle that claims nearly 30,000 lives.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Dieppe
programme.desc: The Allies launch an ill-fated attack on the German-occupied port of Dieppe, France.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: German forces encounter Russian resistance.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: El Alamein
programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: North Africa (November 1942)
programme.desc: In the North African desert in 1942, American fighting forces encounter the dreaded Rommel for the first time to stop the German war machine.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Greece
programme.desc: Greece: In 1944, 28 Greek socialists were shot in Syntagma Square and 100,000 had perished by the end of the Civil War. Was this the old order Winston Churchill had longed for?

programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.desc: When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a young girl watching over a group of Xatu, whose psychic powers let them predict the future of a local village. When the villagers begin doubting their warnings, can the Xatu prove the truth of their visions?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The heat is rising in our heroes' journey when Misty and her Water-type Pokémon go head to head with a willful Fire-type Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After yet another close encounter with Team Rocket, Pikachu is left exhausted and weak. Thankfully, a passerby takes our heroes to a nearby lake that helps recharge Electric types…but also hides a great secret!

programme.desc: Socks, shoes, vampire towels and other miscellaneous objects are vanishing, disappearing, as if vanishing into some void. // Garden gnomes are vanishing from front yards all over town and many townspeople suspect juvenile pranksters at work.

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Two incorrigible scam artists -- one low rent and the other high class -- compete to swindle a naïve tech prodigy out of his vast fortune.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century Mexico, two very different women become a bank-robbing duo in an effort to combat a ruthless enforcer terrorizing their town.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic drama about two misfits who come together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's one wild ride at the WPT Legends of Poker in Los Angeles as this final table fight takes off.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Only three remain at the WPT Legends of Poker in pursuit of a million dollar first place prize.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Reckless pro Mark Seif is back at his third WPT final table and more than willing to risk it all.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The Borgata Poker Open comes down to its exciting conclusion.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT heads north of the border for a multi-million dollar poker shootout.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The North American Poker Championship comes down to four at Niagara Falls.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Mother Lode
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of an isolated, crazy miner.

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Lost Treasure of Ugarit
programme.desc: Young archaeologist Jack Hunter refuses to join his mentor, Professor Shaffer, who believes a poem is a coded treasure map, on a relic hunt, until his friend is murdered to steal it. The suspect is a Syrian artifact trader so he flies to Damascas.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: My Nanny's Secret
programme.desc: Starring Haylie Duff. When a home invasion robbery leaves one member of the wealthy Tyrell family dead, the family's live-in nanny, Claudia, begins to suspect that her troubled brother may be the culprit.

programme.title: Calendar Girl, Cop, Killer? The Bambi Bembenek Story
programme.desc: A former cop is convicted of killing her husband's ex-wife. Based on a true story.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A vacationing romance novelist, Ellen Wilder, develops a crush on her hunky next door neighbor only to become the prime suspect when he turns up dead! With nowhere else to turn, Ellen begins to investigate on her own…

programme.title: American Exit
programme.desc: A dying father takes a road trip with his son, to try to rebuild his relationship before he dies.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, who has become known as Paul Muad'Dib, leads a rebellion against the Harkonnen, who have the secret support of the emperor.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Barn Burner
programme.desc: After Beat and Sam build a beautiful home in Alberta, the clients egg them on to a paint ball battle on their acreage.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust
programme.desc: Timber Kings: Behind the Sawdust captures the world’s best log home craftsmen like never before! This one-hour special takes you behind the scenes.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cliffside Castle
programme.desc: Beat takes on one of the most perilous builds of his career, a luxury twin-turreted vacation home on the edge of 100-foot cliff.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Coming Home
programme.desc: In Alberta, Beat is tasked with building one man’s dream home on the picturesque farmland where he grew up.

programme.title: Timber Kings: It’s a Dirty Job
programme.desc: A reluctant Joel joins forces with his wife to construct a backyard obstacle course that he hopes will prepare them for one Tough Mudder of a race.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Peter helps restore a Manitoba couple’s love for logs by building a home to replace the one they tragically lost to fire. Meanwhile, the renovation of a neighborhood bar nearly drives Bryan Jr. to drink.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb
programme.desc: Peter is called in after a malfunction with a light sensitive bomb and must disarm the weapon before approaching darkness makes detonation inevitable.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Big Plot
programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow on the Screen
programme.desc: Peter must board a vessel to rescue a sailor who wants to defect. However, a trap has been set using radar to detect the Invisible Man on a TV screen.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Mink Coat
programme.desc: While vacationing, Peter's sister becomes convinced that the inner-lining of an airplane passenger's fur coat is being used for smuggling purposes.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A fatal traffic collision reveals a shocking truth; Andy and Callaghan's relationship gets complicated when they disagree over the handling of a witness in a murder case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Chris and Andy face a tough decision while investigating a vicious beating; Sam and Luke get competitive during a retraining exercise.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Parker

programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives: At Close Range
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: With Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home . Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Magic Mutt/U.S. Acres: Short Story/Monday Misery
programme.desc: When Jon goes to an all-night magic shop./Booker is irritated by his height./Garfield attempts to defeat the evil day, Monday.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Best of Breed/U.S. Acres: National Tapioca Pudding Day/All About Odie
programme.desc: Garfield and Nermal are the finalists in a big cat show./Roy invents a holiday./Garfield tries to lecture an audience about himself.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Caped Avenger/U.S. Acres: Shy Fly Guy/Green Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Garfield dons the disguise of "the Caped Avenger."/Wade's fear of flying comes full throttle./Jon decides to grow his own food.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Forget Me Not/U.S Acres: I Like Having You Around!/Sales Resistance
programme.desc: Garfield loses his memory and becomes "nice."/Bo moves out of the house just as big storm hits./The worlds' greatest salesman shows up.

programme.desc: Garfield finds competition from a mangy stray./Roy's jokes become so intolerable, that Orson fires the rooster./Garfield buys a winning lottery ticket and becomes a millionaire.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Rip Van Kitty/Grabbity/The Big Catnap

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Great Getaway/Scrambled Eggs/Hansel and Garfield
programme.desc: Jon tries to getaway by going to New York only to find Garfield stowed-away in his suitcase./Sheldon gets mixed up with a turtle egg./Garfield tries to entertain Nermal by telling him a fairy tail.

programme.desc: Jon mistakenly buys a man-eating fern./Orson tries to get a record player for Bo./Jon becomes a health and exercise nut.

programme.desc: Garfield lectures a group about a famous water voyage./Orson imagines himself a famous secret agent./Jon gives Garfield his "little black book" to hide.

programme.title: On the Case: Tangled Web
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day rendezvous ends in murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Campus Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl goes missing from her university campus, her mother is forced to lead an investigation for the truth. Can she find her precious daughter before it's too late?

programme.title: On the Case: At Death's Door
programme.desc: After a single mother is viciously attacked and left for dead, she still manages to help police track down her assailant.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Omen
programme.desc: Paula takes a look at the disturbing disappearance case of a teenager who vanished without a trace from a cinema car park.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood and Betrayal
programme.desc: A military police officer is found murdered in her own home, sending police on a twisted journey for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: A Father's Quest
programme.desc: After finding his beautiful 19 year old daughter dead, a father launches a relentless pursuit of her killer.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Body In The Suitcase: Lorenzo Simon
programme.desc: On 12th May 2014 a human torso was discovered in a suitcase during routine maintenance work on a Birmingham canal. With no useable DNA and no other body parts, the case initially seemed impossible to crack.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Citizen Jane
programme.desc: When Gertrude McCabe was murdered, her niece Jane Alexander was named her principal beneficiary. Jane, a widow in her 70s, began to suspect that her live-in boyfriend, Tom O'Donnell, might have been involved in the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: At 16 Mindy Berenyi, an Antwerp, Ohio girl claiming to be a victim of physical and psychological abuse, was tried for the murder of her father and, having agreed to a plea bargain, was sentenced to prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Accused
programme.desc: In 1996 the car which Sheila Bryan was driving with her mother as passenger accidentally veered off the road and into a ditch killing her mother. Sheila was charged with murder -- then tried, convicted, and sentenced to life imprisonment.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ghosts of Mississippi
programme.desc: A report on a string of unsolved homicides in Columbus, Mississippi. Five elderly residents, all living within a mile of each other, were killed within 18 months. Police say, a terrified community believes a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Elizabeth Welsh's husband, Patrick, left her and their two sons what appeared to be a suicide note and disappeared. After investigating the situation, Elizabeth discovered that Patrick is still alive, living in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Getting Away with Murder?
programme.desc: A report on families who have experienced the violent death of a loved one and believe they know the identity of the killer but lack evidence to back the charge.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: “Brain on Fire” author Susannah Callahan, spent a fortune identifying what was making her ill. After a misdiagnosis, a simple test was administered, and the real source of her ailment was unveiled.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. Eventually, a connection is made to all seven victims.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Can dogs help cure a deadly childhood disease? An NFL star and his wife are betting their son’s life on it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys can't resolve their differences, Holly sends the three of them to couples' therapy, where they discover that Holly is the problem.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly takes Haskell on a practice date, and finds herself blown away by Haskell's hidden talents. Stuart embarrasses Phil when he tries way too hard to fit in with Phil's friends.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly tries to get to the bottom of a big secret between Eden and her boss. Stuart is about to be reunited with his beloved dog – until Phil loses him.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s quest to land a new client puts the boys in a strip club, and Stuart in the hospital. Holly’s new “magic bra” works wonders.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s office crush Paul returns to work, and she is determined to find out how he feels about her once and for all.Stuart, sick of doing all the cleaning himself hires a maid, who quickly turns Haskell’s life upside down.

programme.title: The Exes: The Party
programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes: Sister Act
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After not being seen for several days, Rita Parminter was found dead in her home in Hastings. To police, it initially appeared that she had taken her own life.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: In the US, a missing woman's body is found washed up on the shore of a tidal estuary. CCTV, DNA and a cryptic note lead investigators to her ex-partner.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: When a UK fisherman is murdered and dumped in the River Thames, forensics link three men to the scene. But evidence lost in the river makes convicting his killers challenging.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A woman's husband reports her falling overboard into Lake Erie, US, but police suspect foul play. When her body surfaces three weeks on, it's clear this was no boating accident.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A murdered US woman is found 230 miles from home, dumped from a bridge into swamp. Was she killed by someone she met online, or by her own husband?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: The Case: The Final Round

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a little girl is found in the Arizona desert. Detectives are unable to identify her, so the local community lays her to rest with the name 'Little Miss Nobody'.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1981, the body of Sylvia Quayle is discovered by her distraught father in her Cherry Hills home. It turns out that she had been shot, stabbed and sexually assaulted, resulting in her death.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is last seen alive hitchhiking on Valentine's Day. The next day her body is discovered along a deserted road. It appeared as though she had been strangled to death with a bikini top.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The bruised and bloodied body of 25-year-old Naval recruit Pamela Cahanes is found in an abandoned lot near the Naval training centre in Orlando, Florida, in the southeast of the United States.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes have to figure how to get a new type of rocket back to England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a U.S. general out of camp just as General Burkhalter's sister shows up with her intended - Klink's new number two.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to discredit a German officer who knows about the operations at Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The underground team that needs help in blowing up a mobile rocket-launcher battery includes a very lovely woman.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The prisoners create an elaborate underground ruse to fool a German spy that has been placed in their ranks.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank, Hogan and his men are determined to steal one, so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 9

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 1
programme.desc: Interceptor Stu Chaney deals with a missing crossbow.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: To Love and to Cherish

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go

programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Dave's pulse racing.

programme.desc: The medics help a man bleeding profusely, another who is in agony after falling and a woman with a cripplingly painful bowel condition.

programme.title: An Arthur Thanksgiving

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Snow Biz/Bugged

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Imaginary Friend/Arthur's Lost Library Book

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tv-Free Week/Night Fright
programme.desc: The kids and parents of Ellwood City have all pledged not to watch TV for one whole week. Can they last? Then, big, brave Binky Barnes would be toast if people ever discovered he can't sleep without a night light.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib
programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: North Africa (November 1942)

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Sicily
programme.desc: Fresh from victory in North Africa, the Allies successfully invade the island of Sicily, staging an eventual Italian withdrawal from the war.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Bombing of Ploesti
programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Anzio
programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Kwajalein
programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle in Palau (Summer 1944)
programme.desc: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: D-Day (June 6,1944)

programme.title: Shasha & Milo
programme.desc: Beats drop in a hero and villain dance off.

programme.title: Shasha & Milo
programme.desc: Luca finds that he is not particularly impressed by Sundae's latest group of inventions.

programme.title: Shasha & Milo
